_README: Config for scripts/frame-screenshots.js. Copy this, edit palette + screens + order for your app, then: node frame-screenshots.js <thisfile> <rawDir> <outDir> <device>. 'order' lists screen keys in store order (frame 1 first — make it your most exciting screen). Each key must have a raw <key>.png in rawDir and an entry in 'screens'. eyebrow = ALL-CAPS feature label; head = benefit headline (use \n for line breaks). tone picks a background from 'tones' (or the built-in 'hot'/'forest'/'paper'). pop = optional energy chip (big number / rank / %).

screens._feature-graphic_note: For the Play feature graphic (1024x500), add a 'graphic' order list run with device 'feature-graphic' — it needs NO raw png (background + headline only). Example: a separate config, or render this set then run: node frame-screenshots.js <thisfile> <rawDir> <outDir> feature-graphic (it'll render every order entry as a banner; keep a graphic-only config if you just want one).

graphic.head: One-line tagline for the store banner

devices._note: Built-in keys: iphone-6.9, iphone-6.5, ipad-13, android-phone, android-tablet. Add or override here. 'kind' is phone|tablet (controls proportions). Per-screen 'fallback' lets a device reuse another raw, e.g. ipad reusing a teacher screen for a student-only live frame.
